name: Beef and Cabbage Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Split and toast the hamburger buns.
2. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and celery in a large skillet until the meat is brown. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in the cabbage, green pepper, catsup, water, salt, and mustard. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer until the vegetables are tender, about 25 minutes.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the bottom halves of the buns and top with the remaining halves.
6. For Sloppy Joes, omit the cabbage and salt.
